title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 172.480 - Chair of dairy husbandry established
text:
172.480.  Chair of dairy husbandry established. — In order to aid in the development of the dairy industry of this state, there is hereby established in the College of Agriculture and Mechanic Arts of the University of the State of Missouri a chair of dairy husbandry.
(RSMo 1939 § 10825) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 9668; 1919 § 11565; 1909 § 11136
